svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="architecture" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-559" dy="-174" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="esp" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="ESP sensor nodes
ESP8266 · ESP32-C3 / C6" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="40" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mosquitto" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Mosquitto
MQTT broker :1883" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="340" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ingest" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="ingest
MQTT → Postgres" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="610" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="postgres" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;size=15;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="PostgreSQL
:5433 (host)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="870" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="blitz" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;dashed=1;fontColor=#333333;" value="Blitzortung.org
public MQTT feed (optional)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="590" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="browser" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;" value="Browser
dashboard · /gps map" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="40" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="web" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="web
Next.js :9530" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="340" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="api
FastAPI :8000 + /ws/live" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="650" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="esp" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="mosquitto" value="MQTT"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="mosquitto" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="ingest" value="sensors/#"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="ingest" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="postgres" value="INSERT"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="blitz" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="ingest" value="lightning strikes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="ingest" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;entryX=0.75;entryY=1;" target="mosquitto" value="republish"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="650" y="300" /> <mxPoint x="475" y="300" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="mosquitto" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.25;entryY=0;" target="api" value="MQTT"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="430" y="330" /> <mxPoint x="695" y="330" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.75;exitY=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;" target="postgres" value="SQL reads"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="785" y="340" /> <mxPoint x="950" y="340" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="web" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;" target="browser" value="HTTP"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;" target="browser" value="REST + /ws/live WebSocket"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="740" y="550" /> <mxPoint x="140" y="550" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 190px; margin-left: 11px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
